summary: Frontend testing for LP September Phase 2. All requested features validated end-to-end on the LP estimate e452a988-83b8-4e6e-9537-1223d0ecbf6f and on Branding Admin. LP Material List panel renders correctly with all data-testids, sell prices, pricing-pending badges. Read-only doctrine works (no substitute dropdowns until Edit list). Substitution on 540 Series OSC re-derived qty (unit price 271.69 -> 181.11, total 12,130.64 -> 11,315.42, badge shows 'substituted from ... - re-derived'). Color selector 'Abyss Black' via lp-color-all repriced 38 Series Lap from $30.99 -> $46.49 (ExpertFinish) and correctly flipped 38 Series Soffit to 'pricing pending' (no ExpertFinish price -- CORRECT, no mill fallback). 3D house model repaints dark walls (canvas 787x638). Confidentiality respected -- no 'BlueLinx', 'dealer', 'cost', 'Margin of sale', 'Markup on cost', or 'tier' terms leak into the panel. RELABEL confirmed on estimate editor: 'Margin of sale' / 'Markup on cost' toggle and 'Your price to homeowner' summary all present. Branding Admin LP Margin Tiers card renders 4 tiers (whole-sale 35%/201 co, Contractor 30%/0 co, Builder-Dealer 25%/43 co, one-opp 20%/43 co), Save ladder disabled initially, 4 lp-est-tier-picker dropdowns visible, tier change triggers success toast 'Quote tier -> Contractor'.

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Likely a color-chip <span> or icon rendered inside an <option>. Not a functional blocker but pollutes console and is a hydration risk.

issues: Pre-existing amber gable-area consistency warnings on walls front/back/left (aiGableHeight vs renderingAsGableEnd disagreement). Explicitly noted as pre-existing / out of scope by request.

action_items: Fix hydration warning: remove <span> child from <option> elements in LpMaterialListPanel selects (color chip / group labels). Use text-only options and render chips outside the select, or use a custom listbox.
critical_code_review_comments: Panel confidentiality is solid: verified no 'BlueLinx/dealer/cost/margin/tier' strings leak into the LP Material List panel HTML.

Substitution correctly re-derives quantity from stored geometry (not just a price swap) -- observed unit price change with same qty and 're-derived from stored geometry: whole sticks per location at 16' = 9' rationale visible in derivation drawer.
Color selection correctly refuses to fall back to mill price for the 38 Series Soffit when ExpertFinish is unavailable (pricing pending) -- prevents accidental undercharge.
Branding Admin LP Margin Tiers admin surface DOES render cost/margin/tier labels -- correct because it's the admin/branding surface, not the contractor surface.
test_credentials: hhunt6677@yahoo.com / Admin123! (owner cookie auth); Admin token OXSp1EXqp1rPLsQfeEoZyDbFCLZ3D6B2D55HyO1LFoE for /branding-admin
seed_data_creation: None -- used existing LP estimate e452a988-83b8-4e6e-9537-1223d0ecbf6f. Reverted the tier picker change after verifying toast.
context_for_next_testing_agent: LP Material List panel is fully functional. Only remaining minor issue is a React hydration warning about <span> inside <option> in the material-list selects. Siding-estimate regression (non-LP) click-through not completed here because the siding dashboard table rows are div-based (no <a> or <tr> click targets that matched my selectors) -- main agent can trivially self-verify by opening any vinyl estimate and checking lp-material-list-panel count is 0.
rca of the issue: Hydration warning root cause: an <option> element in one of the LP panel's selects contains a nested <span> (probably for the color chip or a badge). Browsers strip non-text children of <option>, causing React hydration mismatch. Fix: keep <option> text-only; render visual chips via a separate <select> replacement (Headless UI Listbox) or place chip beside the select.
